question: [File: 'File Name: monitor/src/main/java/org/hiero/mirror/monitor/config/MonitorConfiguration.java -> Scope: Critical: Network not being able to confirm new transactions (total network shutdown)'] [Function: publish()] Can an unprivileged external user trigger unbounded thread creation by causing publishProperties.getClients() to be set to an extremely large value via externally-supplied configuration, exhausting JVM thread resources in Schedulers.newParallel('publisher', publishProperties.getClients()), causing the publish flow to halt and the network to stop confirming new transactions?
